mainEntity.name: Difference between temporary and permanent disability in Utah workplace injury claims?
mainEntity.text: Difference between temporary and permanent disability in Utah workplace injury claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: Temporary disability pays while healing (TTD/TPD); permanent pays after maximum medical improvement for lasting impairment (PPI).

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah: TTD 2/3 wages 312 weeks max; PPI based on impairment schedule. Insurers push early MMI to minimize payouts. Doctor's opinion key; appeal Commission ratings. Relevant for Murray/Millcreek injuries where long recovery common.

name: Temporary vs Permanent Disability in Utah Workers' Comp
description: Temporary disability pays while healing (TTD/TPD); permanent pays after maximum medical improvement for lasting impairment (PPI).
